subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I humble my brow with the dust of Thy sacred and immaculate threshold, and lay low my countenance upon that hallowed soil [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اغبر جبینی بتراب عتبه قدسک الطاهره و امرغ وجهی بتلک التربه
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for teaching
